hero.title: RTTTL Hub
hero.subtitle: Explore collections of retro RTTTL ringtones. Browse, play, and create chiptunes right in your browser.

browse.title: Massive Library
browse.description: Explore a vast PICAXE library of classic RTTTL ringtones covering every genre.

play.title: Play in Browser
play.description: Listen to any tone instantly using the Web Audio API — no plugins required.

create.title: Create Your Own
create.description: Compose custom RTTTL ringtones with the built-in editor and share with the community.

openSource.title: Open Source
openSource.description: Free and open-source. Contribute on GitHub or deploy your own instance.

group.librariesDesc: Ringtone collections from trusted sources and brands.
group.communityDesc: Ringtones created and shared by users.

collections.title: Collections
collections.subtitle: Browse ringtone collections from different sources.

picaxe.name: PICAXE
picaxe.description: A massive collection of classic RTTTL ringtones from the PICAXE library. Covers pop, rock, TV themes, Christmas tunes, and more.

community.name: Community
community.description: Ringtones created by the community. Create your own and share with everyone.

escConfigurator.name: ESC Configurator
escConfigurator.description: A community-curated collection of FPV motor startup melodies for ESC Configurator. Tunes are submitted by contributors and merged into the project via pull requests by the maintainer.

skullyRtttl.name: Skully RTTTL
skullyRtttl.description: A handpicked collection of classic ringtone examples from the RTTTL Web Composer project by ImSkully, covering pop, movie themes, alerts, and more.

esphome.name: ESPHome
esphome.description: Official RTTTL example tunes from the ESPHome documentation, including classic themes from Star Wars, Mission Impossible, Super Mario, and built-in alert sounds.

editor.title: RTTTL Editor
editor.placeholder: Select a ringtone or paste RTTTL code here...
editor.resetConfirmMessage: This will discard all your changes and restore the original RTTTL code. Continue?
editor.removeTrackConfirm: Are you sure you want to remove Track {{index}}?

create.title: RTTTL Editor
create.name: Name
create.localStorageHint: Ringtones you create are saved locally in your browser.
create.cutDialogDesc: Select tracks to apply the cut to:
create.newProjectConfirm: You have unsaved track data. Create a new project and discard current data?
create.importConfirm: You have unsaved track data. Import and replace current data?

favorites.title: My Favorites
favorites.empty: No favorites yet. Click the heart icon on any ringtone to add it.

footer.aboutDescription: RTTTL Hub is a platform for exploring and playing retro RTTTL ringtones.
footer.copyright: © 2026 RTTTL Hub. Trademarks and brands are the property of their respective owners.

cookie.title: Your privacy matters
cookie.description: We use cookies to enhance your experience and analyze site traffic. 'Accept all' to consent per our Cookie and Privacy policies.
cookie.necessaryDesc: Essential cookies that enable basic functions like page navigation and access to secure areas.
cookie.preferencesDesc: Cookies that remember your settings like language and theme preferences.
cookie.statisticsDesc: Cookies that help us understand how visitors interact with the website.

terms.welcome: Hi, we're RTTTL Hub and welcome to our platform. We're happy to have you here and we hope you enjoy exploring retro ringtones.
terms.aboutUsDesc: RTTTL Hub is a platform for browsing, playing, and creating RTTTL (Ring Tone Text Transfer Language) ringtones. The platform allows users to explore a vast curated library of classic ringtones, create custom ringtones, and save favorites — all within the browser.
terms.userTermsIntro: By accessing and using RTTTL Hub, you acknowledge and agree that the following terms apply to your use of the platform:
terms.userTermsD: Any applicable guidelines published on our platform.
terms.yourPrivacy: For more information on how we handle information when you use RTTTL Hub, please see our Privacy Policy.
terms.noAccount: RTTTL Hub currently operates without user accounts. All data (favorites, preferences, custom ringtones) is stored locally in your browser. You are responsible for managing your own local data.
terms.futureAccount: We may introduce account functionality in the future. If so, these terms will be updated accordingly with advance notice.
terms.access: Subject to your compliance with these Terms, you are granted a non-exclusive, limited, non-transferable license to access and use RTTTL Hub for personal or non-commercial use.
terms.restrictionA: Interfere with or disrupt the integrity or performance of RTTTL Hub (for example through sending mass requests, "flooding" servers, or introducing malicious code);
terms.restrictionB: Attempt to gain unauthorized access to RTTTL Hub or related systems;
terms.restrictionC: Use data mining, robots, or similar tools to scrape or mass-download content from RTTTL Hub;
terms.restrictionD: Copy, redistribute, or commercially exploit the RTTTL Hub platform or its compiled collection data without permission;
terms.restrictionE: Use RTTTL Hub for any illegal purpose or in violation of applicable laws.
terms.rtttlData: The RTTTL ringtone data available on RTTTL Hub is sourced from publicly available collections (such as the PICAXE library) and community contributions. Individual ringtone melodies may be subject to copyright by their respective composers or rights holders.
terms.userCreated: Ringtones you create using the built-in editor are stored locally in your browser. You retain all rights to content you create.
terms.platform: The RTTTL Hub platform, including its design, code, and compilation, is the intellectual property of its creators. The source code is available on GitHub under its respective license terms.
terms.disclaimerDesc: RTTTL Hub is provided on an "AS IS" and "AS AVAILABLE" basis. We make no warranties, express or implied, regarding:
terms.disclaimerA: The accuracy or completeness of any ringtone data;
terms.disclaimerB: Uninterrupted or error-free access to the platform;
terms.disclaimerC: The suitability of the platform for any particular purpose;
terms.disclaimerD: The legality of using specific ringtone melodies in your jurisdiction.
terms.limitationDesc: To the maximum extent permitted by applicable law, RTTTL Hub and its contributors shall not be liable for any indirect, incidental, special, consequential, or punitive damages, or any loss of data arising from your use of the platform.
terms.changesToPlatformDesc: We may add, change, or remove features from RTTTL Hub at any time. We may also temporarily or permanently discontinue the platform (or any part thereof) without notice.
terms.changesToTermsDesc: We may update these Terms from time to time. We will update the "Last revised" date at the top of these Terms when changes are made. By continuing to use RTTTL Hub after changes take effect, you agree to be bound by the updated Terms.
terms.governingLawDesc: These Terms shall be governed by and construed in accordance with the laws applicable to the jurisdiction in which the project maintainers reside.
terms.contactDesc: If you have questions about these Terms, please open an issue on our GitHub repository.

privacy.intro: Hi, we're RTTTL Hub. This policy sets out how we handle information when you use our platform. It applies to all users of RTTTL Hub and all products, features, and services we may develop or make available from time to time.
privacy.scopeA: This policy applies to the information that we collect when you use RTTTL Hub as a visitor or registered user of our platform.
privacy.scopeB: We are committed to protecting your privacy. This policy describes what data we collect, how we use it, and your rights regarding that data.
privacy.typeOfInfo: The type of information we collect
privacy.typeOfInfoA: We collect certain information about visitors and users of RTTTL Hub. The most common types of information include browser type, pages visited, and interaction patterns within the application.
privacy.localStorage: RTTTL Hub stores your preferences (theme, language), favorites, listened history, and user-created ringtones in your browser's local storage. This data never leaves your device unless you explicitly choose to share it.
privacy.analytics: We may use anonymized analytics to understand how visitors interact with RTTTL Hub, including which pages are visited most frequently and how users navigate through the application.
privacy.howWeUseIntro: We use information to provide, maintain, and improve RTTTL Hub, including to:
privacy.howWeUseA: Remember your preferences across sessions (theme, language, volume)
privacy.howWeUseB: Save your favorite ringtones and listening history locally
privacy.howWeUseC: Analyze aggregate usage patterns to improve the platform
privacy.howWeUseD: Ensure the security and integrity of the service
privacy.dataStorageA: All personal preference data is stored locally in your browser using localStorage. We do not maintain server-side databases of user personal information.
privacy.dataStorageB: You can clear all locally stored data at any time by clearing your browser's local storage or using the settings menu within the application.
privacy.thirdPartyA: RTTTL Hub is hosted on GitHub Pages. Please refer to GitHub's privacy policy for information about how GitHub handles data related to hosting.
privacy.thirdPartyB: We do not sell, trade, or otherwise transfer your information to third parties. We do not use third-party advertising services.
privacy.cookiesDesc: RTTTL Hub uses cookies and similar technologies to remember your preferences and improve your experience. For detailed information about our cookie practices, please see our Cookie Policy.
privacy.childrenPrivacyDesc: RTTTL Hub is a general-audience platform. We do not knowingly collect personal information from children under the age of 13.
privacy.yourRightsIntro: Since RTTTL Hub stores data locally in your browser, you have full control over your data. You may:
privacy.yourRightsA: View all stored data through your browser's developer tools
privacy.yourRightsB: Delete all stored data at any time
privacy.yourRightsC: Export or manage your data as you see fit
privacy.changesDesc: We may update this privacy policy from time to time. We will notify users of any material changes by updating the "Last revised" date at the top of this policy.
privacy.contactDesc: If you have any questions about this privacy policy, please open an issue on our GitHub repository.

cookie.intro: This policy explains how RTTTL Hub uses cookies and similar tracking technologies on our website.
cookie.scope: This policy applies to the RTTTL Hub website and all related pages hosted under our domain.
cookie.whatAreCookiesA: Cookies are small data files that are created when you browse a website, and which are sent to your computer or mobile device where they are stored by your web browser. Cookies serve a variety of functions, including remembering your preferences, keeping you signed in, and understanding how you use a website.
cookie.whatAreCookiesB: Similar technologies such as localStorage and sessionStorage serve comparable purposes on modern web applications. RTTTL Hub primarily uses localStorage to persist your preferences, favorites, and other settings.
cookie.whatAreCookiesC: All references to cookies in this policy also include references to localStorage, sessionStorage, and similar browser storage mechanisms.
cookie.typesTitle: Types of Cookies that we use
cookie.typesIntro: RTTTL Hub uses the following categories of cookies and storage:
cookie.necessary: Essential cookies that enable basic functions like page navigation, website security, and access to core features. These cannot be disabled as the platform requires them to function.
cookie.preferences: These cookies and localStorage entries remember your settings such as:
cookie.statistics: If enabled, these cookies help us understand how visitors interact with the website, including which parts are visited more frequently, so we can improve the experience.
cookie.infoCollectedIntro: The information that cookies and local storage on RTTTL Hub collect includes:
cookie.infoA: Pages visited and navigation patterns within the application;
cookie.infoB: Ringtones you have listened to (listened history);
cookie.managePrefsA: You can manage your cookie preferences at any time by clicking the "Cookie Settings" link in the footer of any page on RTTTL Hub. This will open the cookie consent banner where you can toggle your preferences.
cookie.managePrefsB: You can also manage cookies directly through your web browser's settings. Most browsers allow you to block or delete cookies. Please note that disabling cookies may affect the functionality of RTTTL Hub.
cookie.managePrefsC: To clear all locally stored data (favorites, history, preferences), you can use the Settings menu within the application or clear your browser's local storage for this site.
cookie.changesDesc: We may update this Cookie Policy from time to time. Changes will be reflected by updating the "Last revised" date at the top of this page.
cookie.furtherInfoDesc: Further information about how we handle your data is set out in our Privacy Policy.
cookie.contactDesc: If you have any questions about our cookie practices, please open an issue on our GitHub repository.

auth.signInDescription: Browse, play, and create retro RTTTL ringtones. Sign in to save your favorites and custom tones.
auth.termsNotice: By continuing, you agree to our Terms of Use and Privacy Policy.
auth.createAccountDescription: Sign up with Google to get started. You can set a password for email login afterwards.
auth.registerWithGoogle: Use your Google account to create an RTTTL Hub account.
auth.passwordTooShort: Password must be at least 6 characters

account.title: Account
account.profileNotice: Some fields may be managed by your login provider.
